draftNote: 1 of five queued off a bottom-two lane: Mr_Meat31 (support→offlane).

coaching.headline: Won on towers (10–4) and Cuban's 17/4 Sparrow despite losing the objective count — you converted leads to structures, which is what wins.
coaching.team: Classic good conversion: objectives were 14–17 against you, but you out-towered them 10–4 and Cuban snowballed his lane. Anti-heal was light (1 vs Narbash) and fine. The shape is right — take what fights you win straight to towers. Only nit: a couple bottom-two seats (Mr_Meat support).
coaching.whatShiftedIt: Keep converting kills to towers — that's why you won despite the neutral deficit. A second anti-heal would've made the Narbash fights faster.
